title: Nideen Jewellery Trinket Dish Ring Dish Holder Small Jewellery Tray, Key Dish for Hallway, Gifts for Birthday, Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day(Clear)
features: Thoughtful Gift for Any Occasion: Comes in a beautifully designed gift box with an included card, making it a perfect present for birthdays, valentine’s day, mother’s day, weddings, Christmas, and more.

Charming Glass Jewelry Dish: Made from high quality glass with a smooth, glossy finish, this trinket dish is a stylish way to store rings, bracelets, earrings, keys and small keepsakes while adding a touch of sophistication.
Compact and Versatile: measuring 3.27× 3.27× 1.42 inches, the jewellery dish’s compact size makes it perfect for small spaces while maintaining functionality and aesthetic appeal.
Multi-Purpose & Stylish: Use it as a jewellery holder, key tray, or decorative accent on nightstands, dressers, bathroom counters, or entryway tables for an elegant and organized space.
Durable & Easy to Clean: Crafted from sturdy glass with a smooth surface, this dish is easy to wipe clean, ensuring long-lasting beauty and functionality.
description: Product Features: Jewellery Dish Glass Floral Trinket Dish, Ring Dish Holder Jewellery Plate Key Dish for Hallways Specifications: Material: Glass Color: Pink, Clear, Grey, Purple, Blue Size: 8.3× 8.3× 3.6cm/3.27× 3.27× 1.42 inches Package Includes: 1× Jewellery Dish 1× Gift Box 1× Card -Great Gift Set: Comes beautifully packaged in a gift box with a heartfelt message card, making it a thoughtful present for birthdays, anniversaries, Mother's Day, Valentine’s Day, or any special occasion. -Elegant Glass Trinket Dish: Crafted from high-quality glass with a delicate design, this small trinket dish is perfect for holding rings, earrings, necklaces, and other small treasures while adding a touch of elegance to any space.
